case_title: POTENTIALS UNLIMITED SOBER LIVING VS. ERIC HALLOWELL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-06-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF POTENTIALS UNLIMINTED SOBER LIVING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KEVIN TISDALE, DIRECTOR WITH WITNESS COLBY RUSSELL, GENERAL MANAGER. DEFENDANT ERIC HALLOWELL IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. THE COURT ALLOWS THE DEFENDANT A CONTINUANCE TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. THE DEFENDANT SUBMITTED AN ORAL DECLARATION OF CURRENT ADDRESS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50) SERVED NOV-04-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HALLOWELL, ERIC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF POTENTIALS UNLIMITED SOBER LIVING
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 1/3/23. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO ERIC HOWELL-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/RTS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,795.00 FILED BY POTENTIALS UNLIMITED SOBER LIVING AS TO DEFENDANT HALLOWELL, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER DEFENDANT'S REQUEST
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
